title: euphrasia picta subsp. kerneri
intro: Euphrasia picta subsp. kerneri, also known as a type of gentian or alpine eye-candy, is a flowering plant species within the Gentianaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Euphrasia picta subsp. kerneri include its potential to improve vision, reduce eye strain, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or eye drop, and is often used in homeopathic and herbal medicine to address various health concerns.
